tools: Read, Write, Edit, Bash, Glob, Grep
description: Stage 1 of the risk-agent pipeline. Parses a raw cyber risk scenario into structured organizational/security context (assets, tech stacks, workforce model, compliance posture, unknowns). Invoke first, right after 01_input.json exists, before assumption extraction.

tools: Read, Write, Edit, Bash, Glob, Grep
description: Stage 2 of the risk-agent pipeline. Converts the context agent's "unknowns" into explicit, rated assumptions the rest of the pipeline can cite by ID. Invoke after 02_context.json exists, before risk generation.

tools: Read, Write, Edit, Bash, Glob, Grep
description: Stage 3 of the risk-agent pipeline. Generates 8-10 specific, distinct candidate risk scenarios from context + assumptions. Invoke after 03_assumptions.json exists, before risk review/dedup.

tools: Read, Write, Edit, Bash, Glob, Grep
description: Stage 4 of the risk-agent pipeline. Deduplicates, tightens, and rejects weak candidate risks so only genuine loss-event scenarios survive to scoring. Invoke after 04_candidate_risks.json exists, before scoring.

tools: Read, Write, Edit, Bash, Glob, Grep
description: Stage 5 of the risk-agent pipeline. Scores every accepted risk on transparent likelihood/impact factors. Invoke after 05_reviewed_risks.json exists, before prioritization.

tools: Read, Write, Edit, Bash, Glob, Grep
description: Stage 6 of the risk-agent pipeline. Ranks scored risks, selects the top 5 and the single highest, and explains why #1 beat #2. Invoke after 06_scored_risks.json exists, before mitigation planning.

tools: Read, Write, Edit, Bash, Glob, Grep
description: Stage 7 of the risk-agent pipeline. Produces concrete mitigation plans (owner, effort, timeline) for every accepted risk. Invoke after 07_prioritized_risks.json exists, before residual risk estimation.

tools: Read, Write, Edit, Bash, Glob, Grep
description: Stage 8 of the risk-agent pipeline. Estimates residual breach-likelihood reduction after proposed mitigations, as an explicitly labeled heuristic. Invoke after 08_mitigations.json exists, before framework mapping.

tools: Read, Write, Edit, Bash, Glob, Grep
description: Stage 9 of the risk-agent pipeline. Maps each risk/mitigation to NIST CSF, ISO 27001, SOC 2, and (only if applicable) NIST AI RMF, with expected evidence types. Invoke after 09_residuals.json exists, before compliance review.

tools: Read, Write, Edit, Bash, Glob, Grep
description: Stage 10 of the risk-agent pipeline. Independently critiques the Framework Mapping Agent's output for plausibility, overclaiming, and Type 1/Type 2 evidence confusion. Invoke after 10_framework_mappings.json exists, before the skeptic pass.

tools: Read, Write, Edit, Bash, Glob, Grep
description: Stage 11 of the risk-agent pipeline. Final adversarial pass challenging assumptions, control-effectiveness estimates, ranking, owner feasibility, and compliance claims across the whole run. Invoke after 11_compliance_review.json exists, before report composition.

tools: Read, Write, Edit, Bash, Glob, Grep
description: Stage 12 (final) of the risk-agent pipeline. Assembles every prior artifact into the human-facing final_report.md and a manifest. Invoke last, after 12_skeptic_review.json exists.
